lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਾਜੀਅਨੁ ਬਹੁ ਭਿਤਿ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee srisatt saajeean bahu bhit sansaaraa |
lines.english: By His Command, He created the creation, the world with its many species of beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੀ ਕੇਤੜਾ ਸਚੇ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: teraa hukam na jaapee ketarraa sache alakh apaaraa |
lines.english: I do not know how great Your Command is, O Unseen and Infinite True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਮੇਲਹਿ ਸੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੋਈ ਸਚਿਆਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis too meleh so tudh milai soee sachiaaraa |2|
lines.english: He alone is united with You, whom You unite with Yourself; he alone is true. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਜਿ ਵਿਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sach rate se niramale haumai taj vikaaraa |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the True Lord are immaculate and pure; they conquer egotism and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa no too mel laihi gur sabad beechaaraa |
lines.english: You join some with Yourself; they reflect on the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਵੀਏ ਸੂਹਾ ਸਭੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: soohavee soohaa sabh sansaar hai jin duramat doojaa bhaau |
lines.english: O red-robed woman, the whole world is red, engrossed in evil-mindedness and the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਲੋ ਲਾਲੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਉ ਰੰਗਿ ਮਜੀਠ ਸਚੜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh laalo laal hai jiau rang majeetth sacharraau |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is the deepest crimson of crimson, dyed in the permanent color of the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਝੂਠੁ ਸਭੁ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਇ ਜਿਉ ਟਿਕੈ ਨ ਬਿਰਖ ਕੀ ਛਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh jhootth sabh binas jaae jiau ttikai na birakh kee chhaau |
lines.english: In an instant, this falsehood totally vanishes; like the shade of a tree, it is gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਲਟੀ ਸਕਤਿ ਸਿਵੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਈ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aulattee sakat sivai ghar aaee man vasiaa har amrit naau |
lines.english: She turns away from Maya, and enters the celestial home of the Lord; the Ambrosial Name of the Lord dwells within her mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: soohaa rang vikaar hai kant na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: The red color is vain and useless; it cannot help you obtain your Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਆਪਣੇ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak balihaaree gur aapane jit miliai har gun gaau |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to my Guru; meeting Him, I sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁੰਧ ਇਆਣੀ ਦੁੰਮਣੀ ਸੂਹੈ ਵੇਸਿ ਲੋੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mundh eaanee dunmanee soohai ves loubhaae |
lines.english: She who loves to wear her red dress is foolish and double-minded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਲਹਦੇ ਬਿਲਮ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਰੰਡ ਬੈਠੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis lahade bilam na hovee randd baitthee doojai bhaae |
lines.english: This color does not take long to fade; she who loves duality, ends up a widow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿ ਚਲਨਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sadaa sohaaganee ji chalan satigur bhaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, she is a happy soul-bride forever, who walks in harmony with the Will of the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਬਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad sachai rang laal kar bhai bhaae seegaar banaae |
lines.english: So make the True Word of the Shabad your red dress, and let the Fear of God, and the Love of God, be your ornaments and decorations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਆਪਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap upaaeian aap keemat paaee |
lines.english: He Himself created Himself, and He Himself evaluates Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਪਈ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis daa ant na jaapee gur sabad bujhaaee |
lines.english: His limits cannot be known; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is understood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਇਨੑੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh tthaur na paaeinaee fir aavai jaaee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs find no place of rest; they continue coming and going.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਗੁਬਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਰਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu gubaar hai doojai bharamaaee |
lines.english: In the darkness of attachment to Maya, the world wanders in duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੈ ਵੇਸਿ ਕਾਮਣਿ ਕੁਲਖਣੀ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਛੋਡਿ ਪਰ ਪੁਰਖ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: soohai ves kaaman kulakhanee jo prabh chhodd par purakh dhare piaar |
lines.english: The red-robed bride is vicious; she forsakes God, and cultivates love for another man.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਥੀਐ ਸਭ ਚਲੈ ਰਜਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo tis bhaavai so theeai sabh chalai rajaaee |3|
lines.english: Whatever pleases Him, that alone happens. All walk according to His Will. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਭਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis poorab hovai likhiaa tis satigur milai bhataar |
lines.english: She who has such pre-ordained destiny, obtains the True Guru has her Husband.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਸੁ ਸੀਲੁ ਨ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਝੂਠੁ ਬੋਲੈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਮ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: os seel na sanjam sadaa jhootth bolai manamukh karam khuaar |
lines.english: She has neither modesty or self-discipline; the self-willed manmukh constantly tells lies, and is ruined by the bad karma of evil deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਾ ਵੇਸੁ ਸਭੁ ਉਤਾਰਿ ਧਰੇ ਗਲਿ ਪਹਿਰੈ ਖਿਮਾ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: soohaa ves sabh utaar dhare gal pahirai khimaa seegaar |
lines.english: She discards all her red dresses, and wears the ornaments of mercy and forgiveness around her neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਈਐ ਸਾਹੁਰੈ ਬਹੁ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਪੂਜ ਕਰੇ ਸਭੁ ਸੈਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: peeeai saahurai bahu sobhaa paae tis pooj kare sabh saisaar |
lines.english: In this world and the next, she receives great honor, and the whole world worships her.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹ ਰਲਾਈ ਕਿਸੈ ਦੀ ਨਾ ਰਲੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਰਾਵੇ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: oeh ralaaee kisai dee naa ralai jis raave sirajanahaar |
lines.english: She who is enjoyed by her Creator Lord stands out, and does not blend in with the crowd.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਨਿਸੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਤਾਗੇ ਗਲਿ ਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: soohaa rang supanai nisee bin taage gal haar |
lines.english: The red color is like a dream in the night; it is like a necklace without a string.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਅਵਿਨਾਸੀ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਭਰਤਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh sadaa suhaaganee jis avinaasee purakh bharataar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh is the happy soul-bride forever; she has the Imperishable Lord God as her Husband. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਜੀਠ ਕਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa rang majeetth kaa guramukh braham beechaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs take on the permanent color, contemplating the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੀ ਸਭਿ ਬੁਰਿਆਈਆ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak prem mahaa rasee sabh buriaaeea chhaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, with the supreme sublime essence of the Lord's Love, all sins and evil deeds are turned to ashes. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਧਾਤੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਪਾਈਅਨੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਝੂਠੁ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: panch dhaat vich paaeean mohu jhootth gumaan |
lines.english: Into the body of the five elements, He infused attachment, falsehood and self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇਓਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਚੋਜ ਵਿਡਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jag aap upaaeon kar choj viddaan |
lines.english: He Himself created this world, and staged this wondrous play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਭਵਾਈਐ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aavai jaae bhavaaeeai manamukh agiaan |
lines.english: The ignorant, self-willed manmukh comes and goes, wandering in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਇਓਨੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa aap bujhaaeon guramukh har giaan |
lines.english: He Himself teaches some to become Gurmukh, through the spiritual wisdom of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਖਜਾਨਾ ਬਖਸਿਓਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bhagat khajaanaa bakhasion har naam nidhaan |4|
lines.english: He blesses them with the treasure of devotional worship, and the wealth of the Lord's Name. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹਵੀਏ ਸੂਹਾ ਵੇਸੁ ਛਡਿ ਤੂ ਤਾ ਪਿਰ ਲਗੀ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: soohavee soohaa ves chhadd too taa pir lagee piaar |
lines.english: O red-robed woman, discard your red dress, and then, you shall come to love your Husband Lord.
